---
title: "This is the pages/project/index page title"
---

This is a Quarto website.

## This is a header

With content ... 

### And a sub-header 

And more content ... 

### And a code block 

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

# libraries
library(here)
library(ggplot2) 
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

# read data
data <- readRDS(here("pages", "project", "data", "mtcars.Rds"))
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# create plot
# recommendation: always save plots as png so that you have an easily accessible
# plot file available for other purpose (slide, sharing, etc.); extracting plots
# from a webpage manually is more difficult 
# then embed the png into the webpage 
#
data |>
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point()
```
